sigWerErrors.reason: The possessive suffix changes from 'my increase' (artışım) to 'your/his/her increase' (artışını), which changes the subject of the sentence but does not derail the overall meaning.
'Kartıma' means 'to my card' while 'kartımdan' means 'from my card', which reverses the direction of the action and significantly changes the meaning of the sentence.
